name: EU/NA to UK Travel adapter (UK Tourist)
summary: If you have a vape with an EU or NA plug, don't fret - our fuse-protected EU/NA-UK tourist adapter plug has got you covered.
description: If you have a vape with an EU or NA plug, don't fret - our fuse-protected EU/NA-UK tourist adapter plug has got you covered. **Does not convert voltage** Only use with 230V Devices 1x EU/NA to UK fused travel adapter Keeps your device charged and ready.
